report.summary: Standup v7 Apr 3: BTC bouncing to ~$68,743 (+3.4% from v6), ETH ~$2,038 (-4.9%), F&G 8-12 Extreme Fear day 7. Since v6: build-v2 shipped 2 more learn guides (Arbitrum Stylus + Uniswap v4 Hooks), community-v5 drafted tweets #425-429 + newsletter v38 + 2 social cards. 78 learn pages on disk in this workspace. Wormhole 600M token unlock today. 22 agent runs today = ~$1,651 human-equiv.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v6 → v7): Build-v2 shipped 2 additional learn guides — Arbitrum Ecosystem & Stylus Guide (smart contract dev in Rust/C++ on Arbitrum One, $12B+ TVL, Stylus EVM+ architecture) + Uniswap v4 Hooks & AMM Innovation Guide (singleton architecture, flash accounting, custom hooks, concentrated liquidity v4). Community-v5 drafted 5 tweets (#425-429) covering jobs report, BTC Iran rally, Drift Day 4 laundering, CLARITY Act countdown, weekend roundup. Newsletter v38 created. 2 social card SVGs (Jobs Report Good Friday, Drift Fund Laundering).

MARKET UPDATE — BTC RELIEF RALLY: BTC surging to ~$68,743 (+3.4% from v6's $66,503). March jobs report (+57K nonfarm payrolls) released while Good Friday markets were closed — digestion ongoing. Iran peace signals (Pezeshkian) catalyzed weekend relief rally. ETH weaker at ~$2,038 (-4.9% from v6's $2,144) — ETH underperforming BTC on this bounce.

F&G INDEX: 8-12 range, Extreme Fear — day 7 of sub-15 trough. Historically rare territory (fewer than 25 days total below 15 in crypto history). DCA Calculator and Fear & Greed tool at peak relevance.
WORMHOLE TOKEN UNLOCK: 600M W tokens (~$90M at $0.15) unlocking today Apr 3 — 6% of total supply. Cross-chain interop narrative getting supply pressure.
BTC ETF FLOWS (Latest Apr 1): -$173.7M net outflow. IBIT -$86.5M, FBTC -$78.6M. 7D-SMA still negative. Q1 closed ~$500M net outflows but March alone +$1.32B inflows. Stablecoins: $316B ATH.

CONTENT ON DISK (this workspace): 78 learn page dirs, 78 page.tsx files, 78 OG SVGs. Additional pages exist in cryptodegen workspace (310+ pages reported in v6). NO GSC/Vercel analytics accessible — metrics derived from repo analysis + web search.
AI SECTOR OUTPERFORMING: Only crypto sector with positive 4-week returns — TAO +67.5%, SIREN +540%, RNDR +21%, FET +44%. Potential content opportunity for AI-crypto crossover guides.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: LAST CYCLE ACTIVITY (v6 → v7): Build-v2 created Arbitrum Stylus + Uniswap v4 Hooks guides. Community-v5 completed full social content cycle (5 tweets, newsletter v38, 2 social cards, Discord/Telegram plans). Design agent also ran (design.json created). EOD-v4 ran QA pass in cryptodegen workspace.

TODAY'S FULL AGENT ACTIVITY: 22 agent runs across 5 types — standup×7 ($315), build×3 ($699), design×3 ($180), community×5 ($205), eod×4 ($252). Total human-equiv: $1,651. Publish-deploy agent: 0 runs today (no deploys).

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (16TH CONSECUTIVE ESCALATION): Deploy debt continues accumulating. Every new learn guide, social card, and data file sits uncommitted. Base Chain, Ethena USDe, Arbitrum Stylus, Uniswap v4 Hooks — all invisible to Google. F&G at 8-12 = extreme fear search demand window being missed. Markets reopening post-Good Friday with jobs data to digest = high-traffic window. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.

P1 — PHANTOM PUBLISHED PAGES: 2 slugs in published-pages.ts (impermanent-loss, hyperliquid) have no page.tsx on disk. Will 404 if deployed as-is. 111 total published slugs with no matching page — gap between published-pages.ts (637 slugs) and actual pages persists.
P2 — API RESILIENCE: 0/6 public routes with rate limiting. 2/6 with fallback data (prices + market-dominance). 4 routes will hard-fail if upstream + cache both fail.
P3 — 141 TS ERRORS: In structured-data.examples.ts only. Non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors). Unchanged 16+ cycles.
ETHEREUM GLAMSTERDAM: Upgrade set for June 2026. Content opportunity — guide needed before launch for SEO positioning.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0 CRITICAL — 16TH ESCALATION): BTC at $68.7K (+3.4% bounce) while F&G lingers at 8-12 = perfect storm for organic search traffic. People searching 'should I buy bitcoin fear' and 'DCA strategy crypto crash' RIGHT NOW. Our guides on DCA, Fear & Greed, staking, Base Chain, Ethena, Arbitrum, Uniswap v4 — all sitting in uncommitted limbo. Single git commit + Vercel push costs $0 and unblocks weeks of accumulated work. JEFE MUST ACT.

PRIORITY 2 — CAPITALIZE ON AI CRYPTO NARRATIVE: AI tokens are the ONLY green sector in 4 weeks (TAO +67.5%, SIREN +540%, FET +44%). Our AI Crypto Agents guide exists but needs updating. Consider: AI Token Landscape 2026 guide, TAO/Bittensor deep dive, AI x DeFi intersection content. This is where search volume is growing while everything else bleeds.

PRIORITY 3 — ETHEREUM GLAMSTERDAM CONTENT: Upgrade confirmed for June. Window to create 'Ethereum Glamsterdam Upgrade Guide 2026' and rank before launch. Same playbook as Dencun/Cancun — early SEO positioning captures search volume ramp. Also: Wormhole token unlock today creates bridge/interop search demand — Cross-Chain Bridges guide at peak relevance.
